name: Kangaskhan
description: The infant rarely ventures out of its mother's protective pouch until it reaches 3 years of age.

ability_descriptions.Scrappy: Allows the POKEMON to hit Ghost-types with Normal moves.

name: Horsea
description: Known to shoot down flying insects from the surface by precision spraying ink from its snout.

ability_descriptions.Damp: Prevents the use of self-destructing moves.

name: Seadra
description: Its sharp, defensive back fins contain toxic elements. Touching it carelessly can induce fainting.

ability_descriptions.Damp: Prevents the use of self-destructing moves.

name: Kingdra
description: It sleeps deep on the ocean floor to build its energy. It is said to cause whirlpools as it awakens.

ability_descriptions.Damp: Prevents the use of self-destructing moves.

name: Goldeen
description: Its elegant tail fin flutters beautifully in the water like a dress. Known as the Water Queen.

ability_descriptions.Water Veil: Prevents the POKEMON from getting burned.
ability_descriptions.Lightning Rod: Draws in Electric moves to boost its own Sp. Atk.

name: Seaking
description: In autumn, they can be seen aggressively drilling holes into riverbed boulders to nest eggs.

ability_descriptions.Water Veil: Prevents the POKEMON from getting burned.
ability_descriptions.Lightning Rod: Draws in Electric moves to boost its own Sp. Atk.

name: Staryu
description: An enigmatic creature that can easily regenerate any severed appendage as long as its red core remains intact.

ability_descriptions.Illuminate: Raises the likelihood of meeting wild POKEMON.
ability_descriptions.Natural Cure: Heals status conditions when withdrawing from battle.
ability_descriptions.Analytic: Boosts move power when the POKEMON moves last.

name: Starmie
description: Its central core glows multiple colors when communicating. It is rumored to originate from space.

ability_descriptions.Illuminate: Raises the likelihood of meeting wild POKEMON.
ability_descriptions.Natural Cure: Heals status conditions when withdrawing from battle.
ability_descriptions.Analytic: Boosts move power when the POKEMON moves last.

name: MrMime
description: If interrupted while miming, it will abruptly break character and slap the offender aggressively.

ability_descriptions.Soundproof: Gives full immunity to sound-based moves.
ability_descriptions.Filter: Reduces damage taken from super-effective attacks.
ability_descriptions.Technician: Powers up the POKEMON's weaker moves.

name: Scyther
description: Leaps out from tall grass and slices prey with its scythes. Its movements are blindingly fast.

ability_descriptions.Swarm: Powers up Bug moves when HP is low.
ability_descriptions.Technician: Powers up the POKEMON's weaker moves.
ability_descriptions.Steadfast: Raises Speed each time the POKEMON flinches.

name: Jynx
description: It seductively shakes its hips as it walks. It can cause people to dance in unison with it.

ability_descriptions.Oblivious: Prevents the POKEMON from being infatuated or taunted.
ability_descriptions.Dry Skin: Heals in rain or via Water moves; takes more damage from Fire.

name: Electabuzz
description: Often nests near power plants. It can cause major blackouts if it begins eating city electricity.

ability_descriptions.Static: Contact with the POKEMON may cause paralysis.
ability_descriptions.Vital Spirit: Prevents the POKEMON from falling asleep.

name: Magmar
description: Its entire body is constantly burning with an orange aura. It hides perfectly within active volcanos.

ability_descriptions.Flame Body: Contact with the POKEMON may burn the attacker.
ability_descriptions.Vital Spirit: Prevents the POKEMON from falling asleep.

name: Pinsir
description: If it fails to crush the target in its pincers, it will swing them around and throw them violently.

ability_descriptions.Hyper Cutter: Prevents other POKEMON from lowering its Attack stat.
ability_descriptions.Mold Breaker: Moves can be used regardless of the target's Abilities.
ability_descriptions.Moxie: Boosts Attack after knocking out a POKEMON.

name: Tauros
description: A rowdy POKEMON that whips itself into a charging frenzy using its three distinct tails.

ability_descriptions.Intimidate: Lowers opponents' Attack stat upon entering battle.
ability_descriptions.Anger Point: Maxes Attack after taking a critical hit.
ability_descriptions.Sheer Force: Removes additional move effects to increase power.

name: Magikarp
description: In the distant past, it was somewhat stronger than the horribly weak descendants that exist today.

ability_descriptions.Rattled: Dark, Ghost, and Bug-type attacks scare the POKEMON and boost Speed.

name: Gyarados
description: Rarely seen in the wild. Huge and vicious, it is capable of destroying entire cities in a rage.

ability_descriptions.Intimidate: Lowers opponents' Attack stat upon entering battle.
ability_descriptions.Moxie: Boosts Attack after knocking out a POKEMON.

name: Lapras
description: A gentle soul that can read the minds of humans. It gladly carries people across the ocean waters.

ability_descriptions.Water Absorb: Heals if hit by a Water-type move.
ability_descriptions.Hydration: Heals status conditions if it is raining.

name: Ditto
description: Capable of reorganizing its cellular structure into whatever object or organism it observes.

ability_descriptions.Imposter: Immediately transforms into the opponent upon entering battle.

name: Eevee
description: Its genetic makeup is highly irregular. It can mutate into multiple forms depending on exposure.

ability_descriptions.Run Away: Enables a sure escape from wild battles.
ability_descriptions.Adaptability: Powers up moves of the same type as the POKEMON.

name: Vaporeon
description: Lives close to water. Its long tail fin is often mistaken for a mermaid's tail appendage.

ability_descriptions.Water Absorb: Heals if hit by a Water-type move.
ability_descriptions.Hydration: Heals status conditions if it is raining.

name: Jolteon
description: It accumulates negative ions in the atmosphere to blast out sparks of 10,000-volt currents.

ability_descriptions.Volt Absorb: Heals if hit by an Electric-type move.
ability_descriptions.Quick Feet: Boosts Speed if afflicted with a status condition.

name: Flareon
description: When storing thermal energy, its internal body temperature can reach up to 1,650 degrees.

ability_descriptions.Flash Fire: Powers up SPAtk if hit by Fire-type moves.
ability_descriptions.Guts: Boosts Attack if afflicted with a status condition.

name: Porygon
description: A POKEMON consisting entirely of code. It is fully capable of moving through cyber space.

ability_descriptions.Download: Adjusts power based on the target's lower defensive stat.
ability_descriptions.Analytic: Boosts move power when the POKEMON moves last.

name: Omanyte
description: An ancient POKEMON that was regenerated from a fossil. It swam deep prehistoric seas using its tentacles.

ability_descriptions.Weak Armor: Physical attacks lower Defense but raise Speed.

name: Omastar
description: Sharp beak-like teeth cracked open ancient Shellder shells. It went extinct due to its heavy armor shell.

ability_descriptions.Weak Armor: Physical attacks lower Defense but raise Speed.

name: Kabuto
description: Regenerated from an ancient beach fossil. It protected its body with a strong, highly sturdy shell.

ability_descriptions.Weak Armor: Physical attacks lower Defense but raise Speed.

name: Kabutops
description: An adept swimmer that sliced ocean targets with its scythes before draining their interior fluids.

ability_descriptions.Weak Armor: Physical attacks lower Defense but raise Speed.

name: Aerodactyl
description: A vicious flying dinosaur that was resurrected using genetic material found inside old amber.

ability_descriptions.Rock Head: Protects the POKEMON from recoil damage.
ability_descriptions.Pressure: Forces the opponent to expend double PP for moves.

name: Snorlax
description: Very lazy, it spends its entire existence sleeping or consuming food. Its stomach acids melt anything.

ability_descriptions.Immunity: Prevents the POKEMON from getting poisoned.
ability_descriptions.Thick Fat: Boosts resistance to Fire and Ice-type moves.
ability_descriptions.Gluttony: Encourages the early use of a held Berry.

name: Articuno
description: A legendary bird POKEMON that is said to appear to people lost on frozen mountains.

ability_descriptions.Pressure: Forces the opponent to expend double PP for moves.
ability_descriptions.Snow Cloak: Boosts evasion in a hail storm.

name: Zapdos
description: A legendary bird POKEMON that controls electricity. It lives inside thunderstorm clouds.

ability_descriptions.Pressure: Forces the opponent to expend double PP for moves.
ability_descriptions.Static: Contact with the POKEMON may cause paralysis.

name: Moltres
description: Known as the legendary bird of fire. Every flap of its wings generates brilliant glowing embers.

ability_descriptions.Pressure: Forces the opponent to expend double PP for moves.
ability_descriptions.Flame Body: Contact with the POKEMON may burn the attacker.

name: Dratini
description: Long considered a mythical creature until a fisherman recently discovered a small underwater colony.

ability_descriptions.Shed Skin: May cure its own status conditions by shedding skin.
ability_descriptions.Marvel Scale: Boosts Defense if afflicted with a status condition.

name: Dragonair
description: An elegant creature that emits a gentle aura. It can alter the weather using the crystal beads on its tail.

ability_descriptions.Shed Skin: May cure its own status conditions by shedding skin.
ability_descriptions.Marvel Scale: Boosts Defense if afflicted with a status condition.

name: Dragonite
description: Extremely intelligent and physically strong. It is capable of circling the globe in just 16 hours.

ability_descriptions.Multiscale: Reduces damage taken when HP is completely full.

name: Mewtwo
description: A POKEMON created by a scientist after years of horrific gene-splicing experiments on MEW.

ability_descriptions.Pressure: Forces the opponent to expend double PP for moves.

name: Mew
description: So rare that many experts still believe it is a mirage. Only a small handful of humans have seen it.

ability_descriptions.Synchronize: Passes on status conditions like paralysis, poison, or burn.
